items.title: Quoting New York Times Editors’ Note
items.content: This article was updated after The Times learned that a remark attributed to Pierre Poilievre, the Conservative leader, was in fact an A.I.-generated summary of his views about Canadian politics that A.I. rendered as a quotation. The reporter should have checked the accuracy of what the A.I. tool returned. The article now accurately quotes from a speech delivered by Mr. Poilievre in April. [...] He did not refer to politicians who changed allegiances as turncoats in that speech. — New York Times Editors’ Note Tags: ai-ethics, hallucinations, generative-ai, new-york-times, journalism, ai, llms
items.summary_en: Quoting New York Times Editors’ Note (Simon Willison) highlights a notable AI development with score 5.6.
items.summary_zh: Simon Willison 报道：Quoting New York Times Editors’ Note，综合评分 5.6，值得关注。
